svg.text: Latest direct run: steady-target movement by case
The unanchored target shows much larger step-to-step target movement, especially in u_s. This is the key mechanism behind the bounded_hard failures.
Trace = ||u_s(k) - u_s(k-1)||_inf in scaled deviation coordinates.
Trace = ||x_s(k) - x_s(k-1)||_inf in scaled deviation coordinates.
